description: The AvatarHandDataAssigner component is usually located on avatar hands, and is used to assign key objects that make a hand work like tip touch sources and the avatar object controlling it.

fields.TargetReference: A field to assign a finger pose source to when the avatar above this component is equipped. Usually the ``PoseSource`` on a Component:HandPoser is specified here.
fields.TouchSource: A tip touch source component to put data into when the avatar above this component is equipped.
fields.VibrationRelay: A vibration device relay component to put data into when the avatar above this component is equipped.
fields.Chirality: Whether this component should assign data from the left or right hand data sets.
fields._equippingSlot: This field is auto filled with the avatar object slot that is controlling the tip touch source and other components specified by this component.

usage: This component needs to be under an avatar in order to work, and is used to manage avatar hands.
